prompt: Wize: "We've looked carefully. We've helped Flicker's body. Feeling nervous isn't a stop sign — it's your Worry Dragon asking you to pay attention. Now we choose."

options.label: KEEP GOING — one careful step together

companionContext.situation: Singing Bridge choice — agency after validation, reality testing, and body calm; encourage approach without removing choice

emotionalArc.childStateEntering: at the edge of the bridge choice

childStateExiting.poor: invited to try one careful step

emotionalArc.recoveryCadence: we can go back — and we can also take one careful step together
